02 — About Me

Data Into
Direction.

AI Into Experience.
🇮🇳

Gujarat, India

Born in the land of entrepreneurs and global CEOs. Culture of Garba, spices, and startups shaped a builder's mindset from day one.

🌵

Arizona, USA

Home of 300+ days of sunshine and ASU — nationally recognized for innovation. Currently pursuing Masters in IT with AI focus.

My journey into tech began with a question: how do machines learn, how does data predict behavior, and how do ideas evolve into products people actually use?

Today I build intelligent, data-driven systems that create meaningful impact — spanning predictive analytics, machine learning applications, VR product engineering, and UI/UX design.

I'm a Research Aide and Teaching Assistant at ASU, working at the intersection of academia and industry — turning research into real products and teaching the next generation of builders.

Python TensorFlow PyTorch Scikit-learn SQL Power BI Tableau Data Analytics UI/UX Design Product Management VR/XR Jira
